basic_details.job_title: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Operating Officer, Lab Engineers and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Chief Operating Officer, Incubation Manager, Finance & Admin Executive, Lab Engineers
basic_details.short_information: Software Technology Parks of India Next Initiative (STPINEXT) Chief Operating Officer, Incubation Manager, Finance & Administration Executive & Lab Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://stpinext.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the STPINEXT Chief Operating Officer, Incubation Manager, Finance & Administration Executive & Lab Engineer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: COO: Below 45 years, IM/F&AE/LE: Below 35 years
age_limit.details: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Below 45 years (Permissible for deserving candidates) Incubation Manager (IM): Below 35 years (Permissible for deserving candidates) Finance & Administration Executive (F&AE): Below 35 years (Permissible for deserving candidates) Lab Engineer: Below 35 years (Permissible for deserving candidates)

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Post-Graduate in relevant fields with specific experience.
qualification.details: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Bachelor in Technology/Engineering (or equivalent degree) or Master in Technology/Engineering/Science or MBA from a recognized, accredited and reputed institute/university Minimum 8 years of overall experience in the IT/Electronics industry, start-up ecosystem as co-founder/founder/CxO and/ or as an enabler of Start-up, Innovation & entrepreneurship ecosystem by virtue of managing/leading/scaling reputed Innovation & start-up promoting organizations/ incubators/ accelerators/ center-of-entrepreneurship/entrepreneurship development cells/ mentoring organization etc. Familiarity with AgriTech, Electronics System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) and other emerging technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things, Machine Learning, Analytics, Block chain, Health Informatics etc. Incubation Manager (IM): Graduate from a recognized university. Post-Graduation in Management (Desirable) 5+ years of work experience including minimum 3 years of experience in incubation management & Incubation Ecosystem, demonstrating ability to cultivate, build and maintain strong working relationships with start-ups, entrepreneurs, mentors, universities, research institutions, industry experts, associations, chamber of commerce & industries, state & central government, angel investors etc. Finance & Administration Executive (F&AE): Graduate from a recognized university. Post-Graduation in Management (Desirable) Minimum 3 years of work experience in the relevant field. Lab Engineer: Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics/Instrumentation or equivalent from a recognized university. Post-Graduation in Electronics /Instrumentation or equivalent (Desirable) Minimum 3 years of work experience in the relevant field.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹1,50,000/- per month (COO), ₹ 55,000/- per month (IM), ₹ 25,000/- per month (F&AE), ₹ 30,000/- per month (LE)
salary_details.details: Chief Operating Officer (COO): ₹1,50,000/- per month Incubation Manager (IM): ₹ 55,000/- per month Finance & Administration Executive (F&AE): ₹ 25,000/- per month Lab Engineer: ₹ 30,000/- per month

selection_process: Screening by a duly constituted ‘Screening Committee’ Personal interview before the duly constituted 'Selection Committee'
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the STPINEXT Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of STPINEXT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: STPINEXT Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download STPINEXT Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Bachelor in Technology/Engineering (or equivalent degree) or Master in Technology/Engineering/Science or MBA from a recognized, accredited and reputed institute/university Minimum 8 years of overall experience in the IT/Electronics industry, start-up ecosystem as co-founder/founder/CxO and/ or as an enabler of Start-up, Innovation & entrepreneurship ecosystem by virtue of managing/leading/scaling reputed Innovation & start-up promoting organizations/ incubators/ accelerators/ center-of-entrepreneurship/entrepreneurship development cells/ mentoring organization etc. Familiarity with AgriTech, Electronics System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) and other emerging technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things, Machine Learning, Analytics, Block chain, Health Informatics etc. Incubation Manager (IM): Graduate from a recognized university. Post-Graduation in Management (Desirable) 5+ years of work experience including minimum 3 years of experience in incubation management & Incubation Ecosystem, demonstrating ability to cultivate, build and maintain strong working relationships with start-ups, entrepreneurs, mentors, universities, research institutions, industry experts, associations, chamber of commerce & industries, state & central government, angel investors etc. Finance & Administration Executive (F&AE): Graduate from a recognized university. Post-Graduation in Management (Desirable) Minimum 3 years of work experience in the relevant field. Lab Engineer: Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics/Instrumentation or equivalent from a recognized university. Post-Graduation in Electronics /Instrumentation or equivalent (Desirable) Minimum 3 years of work experience in the relevant field.

content_sections.heading: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Chief Operating Officer (COO): Below 45 years (Permissible for deserving candidates) Incubation Manager (IM): Below 35 years (Permissible for deserving candidates) Finance & Administration Executive (F&AE): Below 35 years (Permissible for deserving candidates) Lab Engineer: Below 35 years (Permissible for deserving candidates)

content_sections.heading: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 - Salary Details
content_sections.text: Chief Operating Officer (COO): ₹1,50,000/- per month Incubation Manager (IM): ₹ 55,000/- per month Finance & Administration Executive (F&AE): ₹ 25,000/- per month Lab Engineer: ₹ 30,000/- per month

rows.event: Last date for submission of application

content_sections.heading: STPINEXT Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening by a duly constituted ‘Screening Committee’ Personal interview before the duly constituted 'Selection Committee'

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the STPINEXT Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of STPINEXT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for STPINEXT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the STPINEXT recruitment is 09-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in STPINEXT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for Chief Operating Officer, Incubation Manager, Finance & Admin Executive, and Lab Engineers posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Chief Operating Officer (COO)?
faq.answer: For the COO position, a Bachelor in Technology/Engineering or MBA from a recognized university is required, along with significant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Incubation Manager, Finance & Admin Executive, and Lab Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for Incubation Manager, Finance & Admin Executive, and Lab Engineer posts is below 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Chief Operating Officer (COO) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Chief Operating Officer (COO) is ₹1,50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is the STPINEXT recruitment on a contract basis?
faq.answer: Yes, the STPINEXT recruitment is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening by a committee followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for STPINEXT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for STPINEXT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official STPINEXT website.

faq.question: Q10. Does STPINEXT offer any age relaxation for deserving candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is permissible for deserving candidates for all the mentioned posts.
